<!--
Thanks for your contribution! Please fill out this template so reviewers
have the context they need to merge quickly.

For security fixes, do not describe the vulnerability publicly here.
Coordinate the disclosure via Security Advisory first.
-->

## Description

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick what applies. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore (build, CI, refactor with no behavior change)

## Testing

<!--
How did you verify the change?
- New / updated unit tests in `test/`?
- Manual smoke (commands, expected output)?
- UI screenshots if `public/` changed?
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering the change.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] I updated the README / `.env.example` if I touched the public API surface or env vars.
- [ ] No secrets are committed (`.env`, API keys, credentials).
- [ ] No breaking changes — or, if any, they are flagged explicitly above.

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, refs #456 -->
